headline: Perseus Makes 9.9% Investment in Aurum Resources
summary: Perth, March 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- PERSEUS MAKES 9.9% INVESTMENT IN AURUM RESOURCES Perth, Western Australia/March 23, 2026/Perseus Mining Limited (ASX/TSX: PRU) (Perseus or the Company) is pleased to announce that it has acquired a relevant interest in 9.9% of the issued shares of Aurum Resources Limited (Aurum) (ASX: UAE) via participation in the Aurum equity raising announced today (Aurum Share Acquisition).
